name: Isabella
bio:
Former Princess of the Kingdom and Captain of the Knights, she fell due to betrayal and her resentment turned into a Wraith. She was revived in the Vampire Castle, became a knight under the Lord, and protects those she trusts with the Phantom Shield.

Role: AOE Protection
Specialty: A frontline Protection-type hero that gains a high-value shield when its HP is low; its Ultimate also has high lifesteal.

skillSlots.name: Wail Echo
skillSlots.description: Attacks first enemy's column for 220% P.DMG with 100% probability to apply 1 stack of [Bleed] to primary target.

skillSlots.name: Thorn Ritual
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies, dealing total 600% P.DMG (single target max 3x ATK), and deals additional P.DMG equal to 20% of frontline enemies' Max HP (max 400% ATK).

effects.name: Entwined Grudges
effects.description: Releases [Thorn Ritual] to gain [Shield] equal to 150% ATK.

effects.name: Entwined Grudges
effects.description: When attacking enemies with [Shield], deals additional M.DMG equal to 20% of target's Max HP (max 4x Caster's ATK).

effects.name: Entwined Grudges
effects.description: [Wail Echo] deals additional M.DMG equal to 10% of target's Max HP (max 2x ATK).

effects.name: Entwined Grudges
effects.description: [Thorn Ritual] deals additional M.DMG equal to 20% of target's Max HP (max: 400% of caster's ATK) when attacking enemies with [Shield].
